subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Master the Distributive Property of Multiplication over Addition
Solve complex expressions using BODMAS/PEMDAS with integers
Apply closure, associative, and commutative properties to solve long strings of numbers
Analyze and solve high-level word problems (Elevation, multi-stage finance)
Predict results of operations without calculating (Sign analysis)

lesson_plan.title: Properties and Distributive Law
topics_covered: Using properties to simplify calculations (e.g., 26 x -48 + -48 x -36)
teaching_strategy: Group terms method for mental math
student_activities: Identify which property is used in a given solved step

lesson_plan.title: Advanced Applications and Order of Ops
topics_covered: BODMAS with nested brackets and negative signs
Complex word problems (e.g., Temperature rate of change over time)
Sign analysis in power notation (e.g., (-1) raised to even vs odd power)
teaching_strategy: Scaffolding complex word problems into small equations
student_activities: Analyze a diving problem: 'A diver descends 3m every minute. Where is he after 10 mins relative to a 2m platform?'

teaching_aids: Real-life data sets (Stock market changes, Depth charts)
teacher_tip: Challenge students to solve expressions like 999 x -45 using distributive property—it shows them why algebra is a superpower for mental math!
